    • Class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine

      class SimulationEngine extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialization Methods

        • readObject
          private void readObject(ObjectInputStream in) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
          Restores the engine after deserialization.

          The listeners field is transient and therefore arrives as null after the default read; this method re-initializes it with an empty ArrayList so that subsequent calls to SimulationEngine.addListener(SimulationListener) work normally. The caller (typically the UI controller) is responsible for re-attaching the listeners it needs.

          Parameters:
          in - the input stream from which to read the engine state
          Throws:
          IOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading
          ClassNotFoundException - if a class needed to deserialize a field cannot be found

      • Serialized Fields

        • grid
          Grid grid
        • neighborhood
          NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood
        • running
          boolean running
        • settings
          SimulationSettings settings
        • tickCount
          int tickCount
